title: File:Virgin_Voyages_Brilliant_Lady.jpg
description: Virgin Voyages Brilliant Lady at Civitavecchia, Italy. The Image that is being uploaded was taken with 10x Zoom on a Samsung Galaxy S24. The Reason it looks A.I. Upscaled is because the photo was taken on a Samsung Galaxy S24 so probably it was upscaled on device. I do have other pictures of the ship but farther away.

visual_verification.method: Manual Read-tool inspection of the .webp by the operator (or operator-supervised agent), 2026-05-14
visual_verification.note: Lady-class Virgin Voyages ship at sea; visually indistinguishable from sister ships
